feed.title: Lab of Reactive Myeloid Cell Biology
feed.subtitle: Non-institutional website for the laboratory headed by Dr. Samarth Hegde, Department of Developmental and Molecular Biology

entry.title: Lab is active
entry.content:
July 2026

Hegde Lab opens in Department of Developmental and Molecular Biology (DMB), with secondary appointment in Cell Biology (CB). The Hegde Lab is a part of the Cancer Dormancy Institute (CDI) at Albert Einstein College of Medicine.
entry.summary: July 2026 Hegde Lab opens in Department of Developmental and Molecular Biology (DMB), with secondary appointment in Cell Biology (CB). The Hegde Lab is a part of the Cancer Dormancy Institute (CDI) at Albert Einstein College of Medicine.

entry.title: Lab at Keystone
entry.content:
Feb 2026

Samarth attended and presented a short talk on their recent Nature paper at the Keystone Symposia on Myeloid Cells: Functional Heterogeneity with Therapeutic Promise held jointly with Keystone Symposia on Hematopoiesis (Keystone, Colorado). For more insight on the conference, check out #KSMyeloid26 and #KSHemato26
entry.summary: Feb 2026 Samarth attended and presented a short talk on their recent Nature paper at the Keystone Symposia on Myeloid Cells: Functional Heterogeneity with Therapeutic Promise held jointly with Keystone Symposia on Hematopoiesis (Keystone, Colorado). For more insight on the conference, check out #KSMyeloid26 and #KSHemato26
